events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: American singer, dancer, and actress Jennifer Lopez was born on July 24, 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true icon! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 tomorrow, still looking and sounding incredible. What’s your favourite J.Lo track to get the party started?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Mick Jagger, frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday. Still got the moves like Jagger!

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when music videos changed everything? 45 years ago on August 1st, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony, eh?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' 32nd Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago this August 5th, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music forever. What's your stand-out track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago on August 15th, a generation gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An iconic moment in history.

events.title: Elvis Presley Death Anniversary
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll. It's 49 years on August 16th since we lost Elvis Presley, but his music still reigns supreme.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: 56 years on September 2nd, we remember the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His guitar wizardry continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: An iconic album cover, iconic tracks. The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57 on September 4th. What's your favourite moment from that masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer and songwriter Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders' frontwoman, still rocking after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher, lead vocalist of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher turns 54 on September 21st. The voice of a generation, still giving it some. What's your favourite Oasis or solo anthem?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' 51st Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic solo single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, in the US and October 24, 1975, in the UK.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years ago on October 1st, John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its message of peace and hope.

events.title: Celebrating the Apple iPod
events.blurb: The first Apple iPod was introduced on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod's Impact
angles.copy: 25 years ago, the world of music changed forever. On October 3rd, we're celebrating the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' – the iconic Apple iPod.

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. It's Global James Bond Day on October 5th, marking 64 years since Dr. No first hit screens. What's your favourite Bond theme?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon's Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On October 9th, we remember John Lennon, who would have been 86. His legacy of peace and revolutionary music lives on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, and screenwriter John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese's Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the comedic genius that is John Cleese, who turns 87 on October 27th. From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British legend.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' 58th Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: An expansive, eclectic masterpiece. The Beatles' 'White Album' celebrates its 58th anniversary on November 2nd. Double album, double the classics.
